headline: Texas Instruments (TXN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of analog chip manufacturer Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) jumped 2.7% in the afternoon session after the US-Iran ceasefire eased fears of a major disruption to global tech supply chains.
